I need to run the gchat_reader.py script with --days 2, targeting Chrome DevTools at 192.168.1.11:9223.
After starting the process, I'll monitor it up to 10 times with 30-second intervals using tail on the debug log.
Once complete, I'll send a success notification; if it fails, I'll send an error notification.
I won't interrupt the script regardless of how long it takes (5-15 min expected).
